metadata.description: Claude Code plugin for AWS account-to-account migrations. Eleven specialist skills (inventory, cost-summary, cost-analysis, dependency analysis, Terraform generation, migration planning, data-migration planning, cutover control-plane, cutover data-plane, cutover execution, post-migration audit), nine bounded sub-agents, and four deterministic Workflow orchestrators (migrate, discover, execute, audit). Output is Terraform-portable HCL with parameterized account IDs, regions, and AZs.

plugins.name: aws-migration-architect
plugins.description: AWS account-to-account migration toolkit: discover-then-confirm inventory across enabled regions, Cost Explorer cost summary + driver analysis, dependency + IAM trust + hard-coded value analysis, templated Terraform generation, phased migration planning with readiness score and cost baseline, cutover checklist generation, and post-migration audit.
